{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech pistol
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Omega]] possesses an [[Aethertech pistol]] that resembles clockwork constantly reassembling itself.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
